title: Design Binary Search Tree
description: Design a BST with insert(val), remove(val), and search(val). All operations must maintain BST invariant: left < node < right.
key_concept: BST: O(log n) avg for search/insert/delete when balanced. Remove has 3 cases: leaf, one child, two children (replace with in-order successor).

hints.L1: Insert: recurse left if val < node.val, right otherwise. When null, create node. Search: same direction logic.
hints.L2: Remove 3 cases: (1) leaf → return null; (2) one child → return that child; (3) two children → find min in right subtree, copy its value, delete that min node.
hints.L3: def get_min(node): while node.left: node=node.left; return node. For case 3: node.val=get_min(node.right).val; node.right=remove(node.right, node.val)
